name: Edgard Varèse
abstract: Edgard Victor Achille Charles Varèse (French: [ɛdɡaʁ viktɔʁ aʃil ʃaʁl vaʁɛz]; also spelled Edgar; December 22, 1883 – November 6, 1965) was a French and American avant-garde composer who spent the greater part of his career in the United States. Varèse's music emphasizes timbre and rhythm; he coined the term "organized sound" in referenc…

works_created.t: Deserts (with Video Created By Bill Viola)

about_quotes.speaker: Roger Kellaway
about_quotes.evidence: I remember going to a John Cage concert and Edgar Varese was there
